zh.Holy Trinity Church, Acaster Malbis, Yor: 英國英格蘭越可爾勒夫 泊霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Fairfax III於大約1350年出生在英國越可爾沃爾頓時，他的父親William Fairfax of Walton26歲，母親Ellen Roucliffe19歲。他於大約1369年與Margaret Malbis在英國越可爾沃爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1395年1月26日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾勒夫 泊霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇。

zh-hans.Holy Trinity Church, Acaster Malbis, Yor: 英国英格兰越可爾勒夫 泊霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Fairfax III于大约1350年出生在英国越可爾沃爾頓时，他的父亲William Fairfax of Walton26岁，母亲Ellen Roucliffe19岁。他于大约1369年与Margaret Malbis在英国越可爾沃爾頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1395年1月26日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾勒夫 泊霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Fairfax III was born about 1350, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Fairfax of Walton, was 26 and his mother, Ellen Roucliffe, was 19. He married Margaret Malbis about 1369, in Walton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 26 January 1395, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Holy Trinity Church, Low Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Fairfax III est né environ 1350, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Fairfax of Walton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ellen Roucliffe, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Malbis environ 1369, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1395, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Holy Trinity Church, Low Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1369 in Walton, Yorkshire, England Margaret Malbis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 26. it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fairfax III è nato il circa 1350 nel Walton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Fairfax of Walton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Roucliffe, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Malbis circa 1369, nel Walton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 gennaio 1395, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Holy Trinity Church, Low Moor, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Walton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアワルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Fairfax IIIが約1350年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父William Fairfax of Waltonは26歳，母Ellen Roucliffeは19歳であった。約1369年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンでMargaret Malbisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1395年1月26日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアロウ ムールホーリー トリニトイ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity Church, Acaster Malbis, Yor: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 무어 홀이 트리니티 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Fairfax III(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fairfax of Walton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Roucliffe(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1369년 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 Margaret Malbis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1395년 1월 26일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 로 무어 홀이 트리니티 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Fairfax III nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fairfax of Walton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Roucliffe, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Malbis aproximadamente 1369, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1395, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Holy Trinity Church, Low Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Holy Trinity Church, Acaster Malbis, Yor: холи тринити чурч, лоу мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Fairfax III родился около 1350 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fairfax of Walton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Roucliffe, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Malbis около 1369 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 26 января 1395 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности холи тринити чурч, лоу мур, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
